description: Emphasis on obtaining equations which define the behavior of physical systems frequently subjected to control; mechanical processing, fluid power, and thermal systems; analytical, experimental, and computer techniques. Knowledge of Automatic Controls [such asM E 446or E C E 322] is required.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing. Not open to students with credit forM E 746.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing. Not open to students with credit forM E 746.
